default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Carmen (Circuit AI) and Marcel (fwd.digital) to explore potential collaboration and share experiences in AI-driven content creation and marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company offers custom AI workflows for content creation, helping brands become publishers and leaders become influencers (9k/month starting, 50k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Carmen is acting as a fractional CMO for Circuit AI, an early-stage startup focusing on collaborative AI-powered document management](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Potential collaboration opportunities identified: website development, content strategy, and referral program for Marcel's services](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Marcel shared insights on hiring offshore EAs and recommended agency partners for website development](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Journey from DeepGram to AI Workflows

  - [Left DeepGram in September after rebalancing work and personal life](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Started building AI workflows, leading to 24x traffic growth at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Launched workshops (33-50 attendees, $500/person) teaching AI workflow strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Transitioned to offering custom AI workflow services, quickly gaining high-value clients (e.g., Ramp at $27k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### Carmen's Current Role and Background

  - [Acting as fractional CMO for Circuit AI, an early-stage AI startup](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Previously launched/scaled digital commerce teams at L'Oreal and Lego](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Transitioning from full-time roles to consulting/advisory work](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Current focus: developing value proposition and website for Circuit AI](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Circuit AI Overview

  - [Pre-product market fit stage with strong interest from potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Well-connected founding team (CEO on Federal Reserve Board, ex-Facebook ML lead)](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Product focuses on integrated, self-updating collaborative workspaces across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Value proposition: secure, integrated way to work with living, breathing documents](https://fathom.video/share/Zx27sqP16FtRjCF4jondey2wtpCY6GxK?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
